commit_scope: Expand kernel-native API wellness stability sensing from the legacy seven-route map to every route in the kernel-served recipe ledger.

commands: git fetch origin main && git rebase --autostash origin/main
local_validation.notes: The old wellness stability probe carried a hand-coded seven-route map while the kernel-served recipe ledger now has 22 routes. The new helper derives live endpoint paths directly from KERNEL_SERVED_RECIPES. Focused proof confirms every ledger route maps to a live path, including /api/utils/coherence_summary_score. Direct kernel sensing after the change reports production kernel_runtime inline and checked 22/22 kernel-served endpoints with no fallback. Rebase with autostash reported the branch current with origin/main, PR guard reported ready_for_push=True/local_preflight=pass, and follow-through reported stale_codex_prs=0.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR creation, and hosted checks.

deploy_validation.notes: No deploy attempted before PR merge. Public health was reachable locally and reported deployed_sha 2f95e45e with kernel_runtime inline.

phase_gate.reason: Local proof passed; PR CI, merge, and public post-merge verification remain pending.

evidence_refs: scripts/wellness_check.py derives live stability probe paths from kernel_attribution_report.KERNEL_SERVED_RECIPES.
api/tests/test_edge_cases_regression.py proves the wellness live probe covers every kernel-served recipe route.
Direct sense_kernel_api proof reports checked 22/22 kernel-served endpoints (inline) with no fallback.
